item.title: Joya Williams , An executive assistant at Coca-Cola offered to sell company secrets to Pepsi for 1.5 million dollars. Pepsi responded by notifying Coca-Cola triggering a FBI investigation. She was sentenced to 8 years in prison
item.description: Joya Williams , An executive assistant at Coca-Cola offered to sell company secrets to Pepsi for 1.5 million dollars. Pepsi responded by notifying Coca-Cola triggering a FBI investigation. She was sentenced to 8 years in prison

item.title: Well, Well, Well...
item.description: Well, Well, Well...
